subject: Fix perspective buttons and calculate handler bugs
body:
Fixed two critical bugs that prevented core functionality after modular refactoring:

1. Perspective buttons not working
   - Changed currentMode = mode to setCurrentMode(mode) in setCalculatorMode()
   - ES6 module imports are read-only; must use setter function
   - All four modes (Vendor, Growth, Client, Admin) now work correctly

2. Calculate button not responding
   - Changed addEventListener('click', onCalculate) to onCalculateHandler
   - Dependency injection requires using injected handler names
   - Calculate button now properly routes to correct calculation function

Files changed:
- ui/initialization.js (2 lines)
- claude.md (added bug fix documentation)
- README.md (updated changelog)

Tested: All calculator modes and calculation functions verified working
title: Fix perspective buttons and calculate handler bugs
